aiPostCreator.title: AI Post Creator
aiPostCreator.willOpenCompose: Will open Compose Editor with pre-filled content
aiPostCreator.selectedCount: {count} selected — AI will generate content for each
aiPostCreator.scheduleDesc: AI will distribute {count} posts evenly across this date range
aiPostCreator.startingDesc: Your {count} posts are being generated by AI. Track progress at the top-right corner of the screen.
aiPostCreator.startingHint: You can close this dialog and continue working.
aiPostCreator.integrationAccessError: Upgrade your plan to use External DB integration.
aiPostCreator.postLimitError: You've reached your monthly post limit ({limit}). Upgrade to continue.

vbout.title: VBOUT API Key
steps: Login to your VBOUT account
Go to Settings → API Integrations
Copy your API Key

openai.title: OpenAI API Key
steps: Sign in at platform.openai.com
Go to API Keys → Create new secret key
Name your key and copy it
Note: Billing plan required for usage

gemini.title: Google Gemini API Key
steps: Visit Google AI Studio
Click "Get API Key" at the top
Create a new API key or select existing project
Copy API key — free with RPM limits

runware.title: Runware API Key
steps: Sign up at runware.ai
Go to Dashboard → API Keys
Create new key and copy
Supports: FLUX, SDXL, DALL-E, Kling Video...

gdrive.title: Google Drive OAuth2 Setup
steps: Go to Google Cloud Console
Create a new project or select existing
Enable Google Drive API in Library
Go to Credentials → Create Credentials → OAuth Client ID
Select 'Web application' as application type
Add authorized redirect URI (your app URL + /api/auth/callback/google)
Copy the Client ID and Client Secret

smtp.title: Gmail SMTP Setup
steps: Enable 2-Factor Authentication on Google Account
Go to Google Account → Security → App passwords
Create a new App Password (select "Mail")
Copy the 16-character app password (no spaces)
Use your Gmail as Username and App Password as Password

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.description: Contact your administrator to reset your password.

users.passwordHelp: Leave empty to keep current password

businessInfo.title: Business Info
businessInfo.desc: Contact details & social links — AI will use these naturally in generated posts
businessInfo.fillBefore: Fill these in BEFORE generating content.
businessInfo.aiUsesInfo: AI uses this information to write the Description, generate SEO content, create brand-specific posts, and analyze your brand voice. The more detail you provide, the more accurate and personalized AI output will be.
businessInfo.targetAudienceHint: Who are your ideal customers/followers? Include age, interests, problems they face.
businessInfo.targetAudiencePlaceholder: Example: Millennials & Gen Z (ages 22-35), tech-savvy professionals interested in productivity and career growth. They struggle with work-life balance.
businessInfo.contentTypesHint: What kinds of content does your brand create? List all types.
businessInfo.contentTypesPlaceholder: Example: Educational carousels, product demos, customer success stories, industry news, behind-the-scenes, Q&A sessions, tutorials
businessInfo.coreBrandValuesHint: What does your brand stand for? List 3-5 core values.
businessInfo.coreBrandValuesPlaceholder: Example: Innovation — We embrace new ideas. Reliability — We deliver on promises. Community — We build genuine connections.
businessInfo.communicationStyleHint: How does your brand speak? Describe the tone and feel.
businessInfo.communicationStylePlaceholder: Example: Friendly and conversational, like talking to a knowledgeable friend. Short paragraphs, occasional humor, no corporate jargon.

approval.title: Approval Mode
approval.desc: Control whether posts need to be approved before publishing

approval.optionalDesc: Users choose per post whether to request approval
approval.requiredDesc: All posts must be approved before publishing

aiConfig.channelDesc: Configure which AI provider and model to use for content generation, SEO descriptions, and brand analysis for this channel.

aiConfig.noKeysWarning: You haven't set up any AI API keys yet.

aiConfig.imageProviderDesc: Choose which AI provider to use for image generation. Providers with image models: Runware, OpenAI (DALL-E), Gemini (Imagen).
aiConfig.channelManagedDesc: Channel AI settings are managed by the admin. You can set up your own AI API keys to use for content generation.
aiConfig.aiNotConfigured: ⚠ AI not configured — set up your AI provider to use content generation, SEO, image creation, and brand analysis
aiConfig.goToAiSetup: Go to the AI Setup tab to configure your AI provider and model

platformActions.connectionIssueDesc: The following accounts have lost their connection permissions. Bot replies may not be delivered. Please reconnect them:
platformActions.fbIgWarningDesc: Facebook & Instagram use a single login session. If you reconnect with the same account here, pages connected in OTHER channels that are NOT re-selected will lose their connection and the bot will stop working for those pages.
platformActions.fbIgWarningAction: When Facebook asks "Which pages do you want to use?", make sure to select ALL pages you need across all channels.
platformActions.fbCrossChannelToast: ⚠️ Warning: Some pages in other channels may have lost connection. Go to those channels → Platforms → Reconnect to fix.
platformActions.tiktokTooltipDesc: Account must be Business or Creator. TikTok App → Settings → Manage account → Switch to Business.
platformActions.fbTooltipDesc: Facebook uses one login for all channels. When connecting, select ALL pages you use in any channel — otherwise unselected pages in other channels will lose bot connection.
platformActions.igTooltipDesc: Instagram uses the same Facebook login. Reconnecting here may disconnect Instagram accounts in other channels. Select ALL pages/accounts you need across all channels.

general.title: General
general.modeTemplateDesc: Use a fixed template to greet customers.

general.greetingPlaceholder: Hello! I'm an AI assistant. How can I help you?
general.personalityPlaceholder: You are a friendly, professional assistant. Respond concisely and accurately. When unsure, leave the customer's phone number so an agent can follow up.
general.personalityHint: Instructions for how the bot should respond to customers. The more detailed, the better.

training.title: Training
training.textDesc: Enter product/service information for the bot to learn and respond to customers
training.textPlaceholder:
Enter information in this format:

📦 Product: Iced coffee
💰 Price: $3.50
📝 Description: Traditional brewed coffee...
📍 Address: 123 Main St
📞 Hotline: (555) 123-4567
training.dragImagesHint: Drag images here to attach to training entry
training.urlDesc: Enter a website URL → the system will crawl content for the bot to learn
training.sheetDesc: Enter a Google Sheet URL containing product/service data
training.imageLibDesc: Image library for the bot. The bot will find images by name and send them to customers.
training.imageLibExample: Example: Image named "Room-109.jpg" → customer asks "show me room 109" → bot sends that image.
training.dragOrBrowse: Drag images or browse from Media
training.videoDesc: Instructional videos. Bot will send video links when customers ask related questions.
training.dragVideoHint: Drag & drop videos or click to upload
training.qaDesc: Question → answer pairs. Bot will prioritize exact answers if matched.
training.answerPlaceholder: Answer: We are open from 7 AM to 10 PM daily, including holidays.
training.qaNoNew: No new Q&A pairs could be generated. Try adding more channel information.

behavior.title: Behavior
behavior.confidenceDesc: Bot only responds if confidence ≥ this threshold. Below threshold → escalate to agent.
behavior.maxRepliesDesc: After {count} replies → automatically escalate to agent.
behavior.smartAssignDesc: Assign to the most suitable agent
behavior.smartMemoryDesc: Bot will build a customer profile (name, preferences, history) and remember it between conversations. When customers return days later, the bot will recognize them.
behavior.smartMemoryEnableDesc: Auto-summarize each session and update customer profile
behavior.smartMemoryTimeoutDesc: How long before inactivity ends the session
behavior.smartMemoryMergeDesc: AI will compress history after N sessions to save memory
behavior.smartMemoryHint: Session auto-summarized after {hours}h idle. After {merge} sessions, AI compresses into 1 master profile.

escalation.title: Escalation
escalation.keywordsDesc: When a customer's message contains these keywords → immediately escalate to agent.

forbidden.title: Forbidden Rules
forbidden.headerDesc: The bot will NEVER do these things no matter how the customer asks — including pressure, deception, or roleplay. Highest priority, overrides everything.
forbidden.empty: No rules yet. Add rules below to limit bot behavior.
forbidden.addPlaceholder: e.g. Never share internal promotional prices not yet announced...
forbidden.saveReminder: Remember to click "Save Bot Settings" after adding/removing rules to apply changes.
forbidden.quickRule0: Do not reveal internal / unpublished promotional prices
forbidden.quickRule1: Do not promise delivery dates without confirming with the warehouse
forbidden.quickRule2: Do not accept orders via chat (direct to order form / website)
forbidden.quickRule3: Do not confirm orders or refunds without an order ID
forbidden.quickRule4: Do not share personal information of staff members
forbidden.quickRule5: Do not speak negatively about competitors
forbidden.quickRule6: Do not discuss politics or religion
forbidden.quickRule7: Do not commit to any terms not in the official policy
forbidden.quickRule8: Do not offer additional discounts beyond active promotions
forbidden.quickRule9: Do not reveal internal processes or confidential information

promotions.title: Promotions
promotions.headerDesc: The bot will automatically apply promotional prices and inform customers during active promotion windows.
promotions.namePlaceholder: e.g. Summer Sale, Black Friday, New Year...
promotions.descLabel: Description (bot will use to introduce to customers)
promotions.descPlaceholder: e.g. Special offer for the Summer season, up to 20% off...
promotions.noGroups: No groups yet. Click "+ Add Group" to add a price adjustment group.
promotions.emptyList: No promotions yet. Click "+ Add Promotion" to create one.
promotions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this promotion?

learning.slangDesc: Slang, regional words, abbreviations, GenZ language — multilingual

notifications.howItem1: When bot detects escalation → immediately notifies all OWNER/ADMIN/MANAGER in app (SSE badge)

notifications.howItem3: After 30 min: bot auto-sends "team is checking" warm message to customer
notifications.howItem4: After 2h: resends Telegram/Discord alert with stale event
notifications.howItem5: When agent replies: alerts automatically stop, flag cleared

followup.warm2HoursDesc: If no agent replies within this time, an alert is sent to the channel owner

queue.title: Client Board
queue.subtitle: Manage AI content pipeline
queue.rejectModalDesc: The post will be moved to the "Needs Revision" column
queue.rejectModalPlaceholder: Add a note for the client or team... (optional)

quota.upgradeDescription: Client Board automates your content pipeline — AI analyzes media, writes captions, and schedules posts. Upgrade your plan to get started.
quota.nearingLimit: You're approaching your monthly SmartFlow quota. After the limit, your own API key will be used.
quota.exhaustedByok: Monthly quota exhausted. Your own API key is now being used for SmartFlow jobs.
quota.exhaustedNoKey: Monthly quota exhausted. Add your API key to continue using SmartFlow.

sources.title: Content Sources
sources.subtitle: Connect messaging apps to send media into your SmartFlow pipeline
sources.noSourcesDesc: Connect Telegram, Discord, or other messaging apps to receive media for automated posting
sources.howItWorks: Send photos/videos → AI writes captions → Posts are auto-scheduled

telegram.desc: Send photos & videos to your Telegram bot → AI creates posts automatically
telegram.step1: Open Telegram app and search for @BotFather — this is the official bot for creating Telegram bots
telegram.step2: Send the command /newbot to @BotFather and follow the prompts to choose a name and username for your bot
telegram.step3: Once created, @BotFather will give you a Bot Token (looks like 123456789:ABCdefGHI...). Copy this token carefully
telegram.step4: Create a Telegram Group or Channel where you want to send media. Add your new bot as an Administrator
telegram.step5: To find the Chat ID: forward any message from your group to @userinfobot — it will reply with the Chat ID (starts with -100)
telegram.step6: Paste the Bot Token and Chat ID below, then click 'Test Connection' to verify everything works

discord.desc: Send images & videos via Discord Webhook → AI creates posts automatically
discord.step1: Open your Discord server and go to the channel where you want to send media
discord.step2: Click the ⚙️ gear icon next to the channel name to open Channel Settings
discord.step3: Go to Integrations → Webhooks → click 'New Webhook'. Give it a name (e.g. 'SmartFlow')
discord.step4: Click 'Copy Webhook URL' — the URL looks like https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123.../abc...
discord.step5: Paste the Webhook URL below and click 'Test Connection' to verify it's working

whatsapp.desc: Send photos & videos via WhatsApp → AI creates posts automatically
whatsapp.step1: Go to developers.facebook.com → Create a new App → Select 'Business' type
whatsapp.step2: In your app, go to Add Products → find WhatsApp → click 'Set Up'
whatsapp.step3: Go to API Setup → note your Phone Number ID (a long number like 123456789012345)
whatsapp.step4: Create a permanent Access Token: go to Business Settings → System Users → create one with 'whatsapp_business_messaging' permission
whatsapp.step5: In WhatsApp → Configuration → set the Webhook URL to: {webhookUrl}
whatsapp.step6: Set the Verify Token to any secret string you choose — use the same value in both Meta and NeeFlow
whatsapp.step7: Subscribe to 'messages' webhook field, then paste your Access Token, Phone Number ID, and Verify Token below

upload.title: Upload Media
upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop files or click to upload

bulkGen.leaveWarning:
⚠️ Bulk post creation is still in progress ({done}/{total} posts created).

If you leave or refresh this page, the remaining posts will NOT be created.

Click 'Stay on Page' to continue creating, or 'Leave' to stop.
